meta.description: Smell index for Pest/Laravel tests. Maps to rubric.json rule_ref.

smells.name: Tautological or empty assertion
smells.summary: expect(true), or assertions unrelated to system outcome.

smells.name: Status-only HTTP assertion
smells.summary: assertOk without JSON, DB, or event checks.

smells.name: Hard-coded ids or order
smells.summary: Asserts fixed ids or first-row order without stable setup.

smells.name: Wall-clock time without freeze
smells.summary: now()/today() in expectations without travel helpers.

smells.name: Missing boundary / empty case
smells.summary: Only happy-path data; no empty or edge inputs.

smells.name: Validation failure not tested
smells.summary: Mutations never assert invalid payload responses.

smells.name: Factory lacks important states
smells.summary: No suspended, failed, or draft states when domain needs them.

smells.name: Factory unique collisions
smells.summary: Fixed email/slug in factory breaks parallel runs.

smells.name: No guest / unauthenticated negative test
smells.summary: Protected actions only tested when signed in.

smells.name: No wrong-role forbidden test
smells.summary: Peer or stranger not denied for policy-bound action.

smells.name: Only happy paths
smells.summary: No error HTTP, throws, or faked failure paths.

smells.name: Invalid transition not asserted
smells.summary: Domain guard paths never expect exceptions.

smells.name: DB tests without isolation
smells.summary: Mutates DB without RefreshDatabase or equivalent.

smells.name: Positive: datasets / table-driven tests
smells.summary: Explicit matrix of cases — good signal.
